CustomField.formula:
IF( Group_Property__c = true,
(((((VALUE(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c ))*10)+ CASE( TEXT( Income_Level__c ) , 'Very Low',1, 'Low',2, 'Moderate',3,0) )*100)+LEN(Name) )*1000000)+FLOOR(MAX( HOMEtracker__List_Price__c , HOMEtracker__Monthly_Rent__c )) ,
(((((IF(ISBLANK(Group_Property_Parent__c),99, (VALUE(TEXT(Group_Property_Parent__r.HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c ))*10)+ CASE( TEXT( Group_Property_Parent__r.Income_Level__c ) , 'Very Low',1, 'Low',2, 'Moderate',3,0) )*100)+LEN(Group_Property_Parent__r.Name)) *1000000)+FLOOR(MAX( HOMEtracker__List_Price__c , HOMEtracker__Monthly_Rent__c ))) +0.1) )
CustomField.label: Inventory Sort
